ocr.text: In the highly competitive landscape of transportation and logistics, on-time delivery performance is a critical metric that
directly influences customer satisfaction and overall operational efficiency. Union Pacific recognizes the importance of
maintaining robust delivery benchmarks to meet client expectations and support our strategic objectives. The data presented in
the table below illustrates our on-time delivery performance over the past quarters, highlighting both our targets and actual

outcomes. This analysis allows us to assess our operational effectiveness and identify areas for improvement. 

The "Quarter"
column delineates the time periods under review, providing a chronological perspective on our performance. Each quarter
represents an opportunity to refine our processes and adapt to the ever-changing demands of the logistics sector.
DeliveryPerformance  On-timeRate  Amount
Quarter  Target  Actual  Variance
YearlyTotal  94%  $115M  1%
DeliveryCategories  LateDeliveries  On-timeDeliveries  TotalDeliveries
The "Target" column reflects our established goals for on-time delivery, which are rooted in industry standards and customer
commitments. These targets are not merely aspirational; they are designed to drive our operational practices and align with our

mission of providing reliable service.

In contrast, the "Actual" column captures the real-time performance metrics achieved
during each quarter, allowing for a direct comparison with our targets. This juxtaposition reveals the "Variance" between our
goals and actual outcomes, serving as a critical indicator of our operational success or shortcomings. A positive variance
indicates that we have exceeded our delivery targets, while a negative variance signals the need for strategic adjustments and

resource allocation to address any operational inefficiencies.

Understanding these metrics is essential for stakeholders as they
provide insight into our operational resilience and capacity to adapt to challenges such as fluctuating demand, supply chain
disruptions, and evolving customer expectations. The analysis of our on-time delivery performance not only informs our

internal strategies but also enhances our transparency with clients and partners, fostering trust and long-term relationships. 

As
we continue to navigate the complexities of the transportation and logistics industry, ongoing monitoring of these performance
metrics will enable us to sustain our competitive edge and ensure that we consistently meet or exceed our delivery
commitments. The insights drawn from this data will play a pivotal role in shaping our future operational strategies and
reinforcing our commitment to excellence in service delivery.
